_schema_description: This file documents the expected Trivy JSON output structure. Generate real data with: trivy image --format json --output trivy_output.json <image_name>

Vulnerabilities.Title: OpenSSL: NULL pointer deref in signature_algorithms processing
Vulnerabilities.Description: An OpenSSL TLS server may crash if sent a maliciously crafted renegotiation ClientHello message.

Vulnerabilities.Title: OpenSSL: Integer overflow in CipherUpdate
Vulnerabilities.Description: Calls to EVP_CipherUpdate, EVP_EncryptUpdate and EVP_DecryptUpdate may overflow.

Vulnerabilities.Title: apt: Incorrect handling of HTTP redirects in package downloads
Vulnerabilities.Description: Incorrect handling of HTTP redirects allows MITM attacks leading to arbitrary code execution.

Vulnerabilities.Title: OpenSSL: NULL pointer deref in GENERAL_NAME_cmp
Vulnerabilities.Description: The X.509 GeneralName type can contain different types of name including EDIPARTYNAME.

Vulnerabilities.Title: glibc: mq_notify does not handle separately allocated thread attributes
Vulnerabilities.Description: The mq_notify function in the GNU C Library has a use-after-free vulnerability.

Vulnerabilities.Title: bash: when effective UID is not equal to its real UID, the saved UID is not dropped
Vulnerabilities.Description: An issue was discovered in disable_priv_mode in shell.c in GNU Bash.

Vulnerabilities.Title: curl: Partial password leak over DNS on HTTP redirect
Vulnerabilities.Description: curl can be tricked to include part of the password in the host name before resolving it.

Vulnerabilities.Title: curl: Heap-based buffer over-read in the curl tool warning formatting
Vulnerabilities.Description: Curl versions 7.14.1 through 7.61.1 are vulnerable to a heap-based buffer over-read.
